nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: Basra reed warbler
nodes.summary: Basra reed warbler（Basra reed warbler，学名 Acrocephalus (bird) griseldis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于东非，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括湿地排水。

nodes.name: 东非
nodes.summary: 东非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括Eastern crested guinea fowl、Dusky turtle dove、Quail-plover等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is migratory, wintering in East Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In 2007, the species was discovered as a breeding bird in northern Israel. Due to the drainage of the Mesopotamian marshes throughout the 1980s and the 1990s, and the subsequent near destruction of its native habitat, the Basra reed warbler is considered an endangered species.Jabbar, M

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In 2007, the species was discovered as a breeding bird in northern Israel. Due to the drainage of the Mesopotamian marshes throughout the 1980s and the 1990s, and the subsequent near destruction of its native habitat, the Basra reed warbler is considered an endangered species.Jabbar, M
